# Enriched History — Full Conversation Summary

> Generated: 2026-04-05 11:10

## Key Session: Agent Office Dashboard

### Session 9756f4d4 (main session - 73 minutes)

**User Goal:** Build a local web dashboard to visualize and manage Claude Code agents spawned as teams

**What was built:**
- **Project:** `/Users/klauskollerkroeff/Documents/agent-office`
- **Server:** Express.js backend (`server.js`, port 3100) with REST API for agents/teams
- **Frontend:** `public/index.html`, `public/office.css` (walkable map), `public/app.js` (frontend)
- **Data store:** `agents.json` for custom agent descriptions
- **Features:**
  - `GET /api/agents` - lists all running agents from teams directory
  - `GET /api/teams` - lists all teams with task status
  - `POST /api/spawn` - spawns a new agent in a new Terminal window (creates `.command` file with env setup)
  - `PUT /api/agents/:id/description` - saves agent descriptions
  - `DELETE /api/teams/:name` - removes a team
  - Walkable office map visualization (still having issues - agents not spawning correctly into the map)

**Issues that came up during the session:**
- Agent spawner worked but agent wasn't spawning into the map visualization
- Couldn't write description (UI input not clickable)
- Terminal window opened but no prompt sent
- Dashboard loading page was slow/stuck
- User requested: "make the velocity 5x slower", "visualize all agents below the map"

**Pending work:**
- Fix agent spawn visualization on the map
- Fix the description input field
- Make the dashboard load faster
- Add "walkable" office map feature

### Other Sessions Summary

| Session ID | Duration | Main Topic |
|---|---|---|
| 51079045 | ~60 min | Auto Dream setup, skill improvements |
| d72c90d5 | ~15 min | Adding more skills via npx |
| 5b2f6383 | ~8 min | Agent model questions |
| 6c93a6d0 | ~10 min | Plugin/skill troubleshooting |
| 59a969d8 | ~10 min | More skill additions |
| 10952f53 | ~8 min | Frontend-design skill review |
| 8e50783d | ~15 min | Web-design-guidelines skill |
| 98308c36 | ~20 min | Hiring agent, command execution help |
| 44e0d268 | ~15 min | Testing/trying things out |
| db4187de | ~10 min | Casual conversation, testing |
| c23e64f1 | ~2 min | Current session |

**Common Themes:** Learning Claude Code tooling (skills, plugins, agent teams), setting up observability, building agent-office dashboard.

content.text:
Here's what I remember about the **Agent Office Dashboard** — here's your local app:

### Architecture

**Backend** (`/Users/klauskollerkroeff/Documents/agent-office/server.js`)
- Express.js server on port 3100
- Reads team configs from `~/.claude/teams/` to discover active agents
- Stores custom agent descriptions in `agents.json`

### API Endpoints

| Method | Path | What it does |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/agents` | Lists all agents currently defined in team configs |
| GET | `/api/teams` | Lists all teams with task status counts |
| POST | `/api/spawn` | Spawns a new agent in a **new Terminal window** (writes a `.command` file with env vars, runs `open` on it, auto-cleans up after 60s) |
| PUT | `/api/agents/:id/description` | Saves a description for an agent by ID |
| DELETE | `/api/teams/:name` | Removes a team and its task directory |

### Frontend

- `public/index.html` + `public/office.css` + `public/app.js`
- Features a **walkable office map** visualization
- Lists agents below the map

### Known open issues (from the last session)

1. Agent spawn **not visualizing correctly** on the map
2. Description input field **not clickable**
3. Terminal opens but prompt doesn't send properly
4. Dashboard can load slowly/get stuck

### What I didn't fully see yet

Let me check the frontend files I haven't read yet:

content.text:
Now I have the full picture. Here's the **Agent Office Dashboard** — what you built and how it works:

## App Overview

### Theme
Pixelmon Edition — a pixel-art 2D walkable office with a Pokémon-style map. The canvas has **desks**, **plants**, a **water fountain**, **resting rooms**, **tennis court**, and **basketball court**.

### How it all connects

**1. Server** (`server.js`) — Express on port 3100
- Reads `~/.claude/teams/` to discover active Claude Code agent teams
- Serves static frontend files from `public/`
- Spawns agents by writing a `.command` file and opening it in Terminal.app

**2. Frontend** (`index.html` + `app.js` + `office.css`)
- Canvas-based 40×25 tile grid (48px tiles) with camera following the player
- **WASD / Arrow keys** to walk around with pixel-art collision detection
- Agent sprites rendered on desk tiles at fixed positions (8 desks total)
- HUD shows agent count, teams, active tasks
- **Agent Roster** renders all agents below the map as cards
- Hire modal spawns new agents via `POST /api/spawn`
- Agent detail modal lets you click a map sprite → edit description, shut down team

**3. Known issues from the last session**
- Agents don't appear on the map until the server reads the team config file (timing gap)
- Description input not clickable in some state
- Loading overlay can get stuck
- Walkable map works but agents don't spawn visually until `refreshData()` polls (every 8s)

### Tech stack
- **Frontend**: Vanilla JS + Canvas, Press Start 2P pixel font, CSS pixel-art styling
- **Backend**: Express 5, filesystem-based team/task discovery
- **Data**: `agents.json` for descriptions, `~/.claude/teams/` for team configs

---

"`★ Insight ─────────────────────────────────────`
The spawn flow is clever but fragile — writing a `.command` file with env vars and using `open` to launch Terminal.app works on macOS but creates a timing disconnect: the agent exists in the terminal before it exists in the teams directory that the dashboard polls. A WebSocket or Server-Sent Events push would solve the 'when does it appear' gap."

Want me to fix any of the known issues?

---
name: Agent Office auto-starts on login
description: The Agent Office dashboard at localhost:3100 is always running via launchd
type: project
---

A launchd agent (`~/Library/LaunchAgents/local.agent-office.plist`) runs the Agent Office dashboard server automatically on login with `KeepAlive: true`.

**How to manage:**
- Stop: `launchctl bootout gui/$UID/local.agent-office`
- Start: `launchctl bootstrap gui/$UID ~/Library/LaunchAgents/local.agent-office.plist`
- Logs: `/tmp/agent-office.log` (stdout), `/tmp/agent-office-error.log` (stderr)

The server must be running for any agent spawning to work.

content.text:
Done! The dashboard is configured to **always run** via macOS launchd:

- **On login** — auto-starts
- **If it crashes** — auto-restarts (`KeepAlive: true`)
- **Currently running** — confirmed at `http://localhost:3100`

"`★ Insight ─────────────────────────────────────`
launchd uses a `gui/UID` domain that's separate from the `system` domain — meaning services in `gui/501` only live in your login session, not globally. The `Boot-out failed: No such process` we saw earlier was a red herring: it meant there was no *running* instance to unload, even though a stale entry existed."
